player_notes.kevin durant: GTD for Rockets Game 2 vs. Lakers with an apparent injury; only participated in about half of practice Monday. If he misses or is limited, massive negative impact on HOU scoring props and positive ripple for supporting cast.
player_notes.immanuel quickley: Ruled out for Raptors Game 2 vs. Cavs with a right hamstring strain. Absence boosts usage for remaining Toronto guards.
player_notes.nikola jokic: Held to 1-of-8 shooting by Gobert in Game 2; series now tied 1-1. Monitor defensive matchup impact on points/rebounds props in Game 3.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant is GTD; if he misses, Houston's offensive structure changes significantly — monitor closer to tip for confirmation.
game_notes.TOR vs CLE: Immanuel Quickley (hamstring) ruled out for Raptors, increasing minutes/usage for other Toronto guards in Game 2.
